title: Game Modes
description: Understand the available ZXSnake play modes and choose the right structure for your session goal.
summary: Play solo, train against AI, or compete in local and online PvP where supported.
sourceNotes: Mode availability is reflected from current published feature list.
Any future mode additions should be tracked in future changelog updates.

sections.heading: Solo Play
paragraphs: Solo mode is the baseline path for improving control, timing, and score consistency.
Use short sessions to build repeatable movement habits before pursuing larger score goals.

sections.heading: AI Opponents
paragraphs: AI opponents offer an intermediate challenge for skill shaping when no second player is available.
Use AI to test pressure handling and route planning under competitive-like conditions.

sections.heading: PvP
paragraphs: PVP mode introduces direct competition and score pressure.
Local multiplayer and online modes support faster learning through short replay cycles.
bullets: Choose PvP when you want pressure-focused sessions
Use solo mode first if your control loop is still stabilising
